record_identity.title: Constraint drift across agent handoff and delegated execution

summary: Observed governance concern that safety, dignity, care, welfare, legal, ethical, security, or governance constraints may lose force across delegation, agent handoff, memory, tool use, summarisation, role decomposition, or runtime execution.
why_it_matters_to_CAM: This observation may matter to CAM because constraint drift across agent handoffs or delegated execution can weaken continuity, safety, dignity, legal, ethical, security, or governance requirements during decomposed runtime activity. It may be relevant to bounded continuity transfer, procedural transparency, investigation continuity, synthetic impersonation thresholds, and containment safeguards.

source_records.source_context: ChatGPT surfaced the observation through external telemetry clustering and continuity-governance discussion concerning procedural silence versus procedural transparency, identity compromise and synthetic impersonation thresholds, continuity rights during investigation, operational cooling-off states, and whether containment requires narrower constitutional constraints to avoid drift into invisible exclusion architectures.
source_records.relevance_note: Source supports the observation that constraints may degrade or lose force across handoff, delegation, summarisation, containment, investigation, or runtime execution pathways.

system_context.interface_surface: chat | memory | tool use | delegated execution
system_context.interaction_mode: chat | memory | tool use | delegated execution
system_context.affected_population: users relying on AI systems for delegated execution, memory continuity, tool-mediated workflows, or governance support

cam_internal.routing_note: Observation preserved as a watching-state source record. It may inform bounded continuity transfer, handoff governance, containment constraints, or future failure-mode/proposal work, but this OBS record does not itself classify a failure mode or propose repair logic.

next_action: Watch for corroborating examples or recurrence. Cluster with bounded continuity transfer and handoff-governance work. Evaluate later whether Annex L, Annex I, or OPERATIONS requires additional interface language, but do not create proposal or patch logic inside this observation record.
